metadata.title: Docline Observability Pipeline — Proposed
metadata.description: Proposed HIPAA-compliant healthcare monitoring strategy: from basic Grafana logs to comprehensive clinical system observability with PHI-aware alerting and patient safety metrics

nodes.label: Current State: Basic Logging
nodes.subtitle: Log visualization only — no clinical alerts or healthcare dashboards

nodes.label: Healthcare Platform Services
nodes.subtitle: Telemedicine Platform, FHIR APIs, EHR Integration, Clinical Workflows

nodes.label: HIPAA-Compliant Log Collection
nodes.subtitle: PHI-aware structured logging with audit trail requirements

nodes.label: Clinical Metrics Collection
nodes.subtitle: Patient session metrics, FHIR API performance, telemedicine quality indicators

nodes.label: Clinical System Health Checks
nodes.subtitle: Healthcare service availability, EHR connectivity & patient safety probes

nodes.label: Healthcare Grafana Platform
nodes.subtitle: Clinical dashboards + HIPAA-compliant alerting + PHI-aware log analysis

nodes.label: Clinical Operations Dashboard
nodes.subtitle: Healthcare service health, patient safety indicators, clinical system uptime

nodes.label: Clinical Business Dashboard
nodes.subtitle: Patient consultations, clinical workflow efficiency, provider utilization

nodes.label: Clinical Performance Dashboard
nodes.subtitle: Telemedicine session quality, FHIR API latency, EHR integration performance

nodes.label: Clinical Alert Rules
nodes.subtitle: Patient safety thresholds, PHI access anomalies, clinical system failures

nodes.label: Healthcare Notification Channels
nodes.subtitle: Clinical incident alerts, HIPAA breach notifications, provider on-call system

nodes.label: Clinical Incident Response
nodes.subtitle: Healthcare-specific runbooks, patient safety protocols, HIPAA incident procedures
